assertionResults.reason: Guest for-sale intent was preserved through login via callbackUrl=/products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a?action=forsale, but after authentication the app returned only to the product detail page with an OK modal and did not auto-enter a distinct sell/listing flow. Re-clicking For sale after login produced the same modal instead of a listing-entry flow.

notes: Guest detail page URL before auth gate: http://localhost:3100/products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a
Redirect after tapping For sale as guest: http://localhost:3100/login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts%2Fcmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a%3Faction%3Dforsale
Observed network after login included GET /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a?action=forsale requests before final detail-page URL, indicating callback intent was requested but not resumed in UI.
Console errors check: none observed from agent-browser errors output.

frictions: Clicking the product card by cached element ref from the home screenshot did not navigate; text-based click was needed to enter the detail page.
